verifyPhone.title: Verify you're real
verifyPhone.description: Enter your mobile number to receive an SMS verification code. We'll use the verified number to suggest your first business number.
verifyPhone.verifyDescription: We sent a code to {{phone}}. Once it's verified, we'll suggest a business number that matches your local market.
verifyPhone.hint: Use your personal mobile number in international format so we can match your first business number to the same local market.
verifyPhone.codeSent: We sent a verification code to {{phone}}.
verifyPhone.sendFailed: We couldn't send a verification code right now. Please try again.
verifyPhone.verifyFailed: We couldn't verify that code right now. Please try again.

number.title: Say hello to your new number
number.description: We picked a local Twilio number using your verified mobile number as the primary signal. You can keep it or choose a different one.
number.detectedVerifiedLocation: Suggested from your verified mobile in {{city}}, {{region}}
number.detectedVerifiedAreaCode: Suggested from your verified {{areaCode}} mobile number
number.detectedVerifiedCountry: Suggested from your verified mobile in {{country}}
number.noSuggestionTitle: We couldn't confidently auto-pick a number yet.
number.noSuggestionDescription: Search by city, area code, or toll-free to choose the best number for your business.
number.loadFailed: We couldn't load a suggested number right now.
number.claimFailed: We couldn't provision that number. Please try again.
number.unavailable: That number was just taken. Pick another one from the refreshed list.
number.skipHint: You can always change this later from your Twilio number settings.
number.pickerDescription: Search local or toll-free numbers before you claim one.
